branch.branch_summary: Select the next frontier after v6.0.0; do not open implementation work until a runtime-backed direction review selects a bounded task.

tree_answer.where_are_we: The runtime is between v6.0 and the next concrete branch.
tree_answer.why_this_branch: Select the next AOF frontier after the v6.0.0 Public Runtime Readiness release through a runtime-backed direction review before opening new implementation work.
tree_answer.what_branch_comes_next: Run a runtime-backed direction review before opening the next implementation task: Select the next frontier after v6.0.0; do not open implementation work until a runtime-backed direction review selects a bounded task.
